cb65425b-cc3d-4f8a-8164-5849f594d708.title: Build data by onboarding 5 additional customers
cb65425b-cc3d-4f8a-8164-5849f594d708.exec_summary: Goal: onboard the next 5 hand-picked customers and run AP & AR reconciliation on neno by early July. Open Banking ingestion is the active build (Dima); per-client Exact connections are planned (Ihor). The guided onboarding home and the WhatsApp/email/Vault channels are queued next, then final QA. The main worry is timing: the onboarding-actions project is still in backlog against a 6 Jul target, and the open-banking provider decision is unconfirmed.
whats_changed: Open Banking provider-agnostic ingestion (NEO-1291) and frontend rework (NEO-1115) are in progress (Dima).

Onboarding checklist scope locked: 6 hardcoded steps (connect Swan, connect external bank, view transactions, reconcile/respond to tasks, send first invoice, contact accountant); team invites, accounting menu, WhatsApp and credit-card steps deferred.
Exact matching (AR & AP) is complete; GL-account picker (David), VAT bracket, vendor selection and refunds still outstanding.
WhatsApp/email/Vault pipeline exists; the upload drawer is still missing WhatsApp + email options (flagged 22 Jun).

risks.text: 6 Jul onboarding target is tight — the onboarding-actions project is still in backlog and its stepper depends on the new transactions UI.
Open-banking provider decision unconfirmed (Plaid ~€2k/mo minimum); single- vs multi-provider still pending.
Email forwarding only accepts workspace-member senders, has no UI yet, and the rejected-email auto-reply is still to be built.

projects.name: Connect external bank accounts (Open Banking)
projects.summary: Provider-agnostic transaction/balance ingestion plus a multi-account Money Management UI rework.

projects.name: Multi-Client Exact Online Connections
projects.summary: A separate Exact connection per client workspace so accountants reconcile each client into their own division.
blockers: GL picker, VAT bracket, vendor selection and refunds still outstanding

projects.name: Present onboarding actions for the next 5 customers
projects.summary: Home dashboard with guided steps teaching the three bill-submission channels and routing to bank connect.
blockers: Depends on the new transactions UI

projects.name: WhatsApp, Email forwarding & Vault re-provisioning
projects.summary: Make the three bill-upload channels work for customers without a Swan account.

decisions.text: Onboarding is a simple hardcoded checklist — a backend boolean/timestamp per step that hides when complete.
Onboarding fixed to 6 steps; team invites, accounting menu, WhatsApp and credit-card steps deferred.
Non-Swan customers must be able to connect to neno (bypassing the Swan requirement) — a prerequisite for the next 5.
Slack notifications required for all document uploads during the early phase.

open_questions.text: Onboarding stepper is a placeholder until the new transactions UI is ready.
Open-banking provider decision still unconfirmed — needs a status check.
Receipt upload drawer is missing WhatsApp + email options (flagged 22 Jun).

next_steps.text: Design the user-journey screens + an Ocean Ionics-specific homepage.
WhatsApp messaging update + email reply automation.
Check Swan drawer configurability; leave Linear tickets for Joel.
All team members test WhatsApp + email forwarding before Ocean Ionics rollout.

cb65425b-cc3d-4f8a-8164-5849f594d708.sources_note: Decisions/next-steps digested from recent Granola meetings and #accounting-mvp / #tech-team. Create a dedicated Granola folder for this initiative so individual meetings get listed here.

fef38f90-b82c-4c47-b377-6dcb9b1a3020.title: Enable accountants to complete VAT submissions via double-entry GL
fef38f90-b82c-4c47-b377-6dcb9b1a3020.exec_summary: Standing up neno's own double-entry general ledger so we can file Q3 VAT for ~6 customers directly from neno. The spike that writes into the previously-unwired ledger is in progress (Mark), and the core architecture is largely settled (insert-only with reversals, period-close immutability, Euro-only, Q1/Q2 Exact closing balance as the Q3 opening). Next is productionising GL writes for Ocean Ionics from ~1 July. The biggest risk is that the ~13k-line, agent-generated spike needs careful review for atomicity and correctness before any of it ships.
whats_changed: Spike (NEO-1302) writing into the neno GL for Ocean Ionics is in progress (Mark).
GL architecture decided: insert-only with reversals; period closes define immutability; Euro-only for now; monitoring over rollback.
Q3 target confirmed: VAT submission from neno for 6 customers (AR & AP), with the opening balance taken from the Q1/Q2 Exact close.

risks.text: The spike (~13k lines, Claude-generated) took liberties with DB writes — atomicity and no overlapping bookings must be guaranteed before productionising. Review under way this week (Mark/Matthew).
Several VAT and period-close edit rules are still open ahead of the DP design session.

projects.name: Start writing to neno's double-entry GL
projects.summary: Wire up the unused ledger and write entries for Ocean Ionics; target real GL writes from 1 July.
blockers: Spike code needs atomicity/correctness review before production

decisions.text: Insert-only architecture with reversals — no direct edits to journal entries; corrections reverse and rebook.
decisions.source: Granola: Next Steps AGL with Mark

decisions.text: Period closes define immutability — open periods allow free reversals; closed periods take new adjustment entries only (month/quarter/year).
decisions.source: Granola: Next Steps AGL with Mark

decisions.text: Monitoring over rollback — no complex rollback mechanics; the accountant review UI is the priority.
decisions.source: Granola: Next Steps AGL with Mark

decisions.text: Euro-only for now; multi-currency deferred but the architecture shouldn't preclude it.
decisions.source: Granola: Next Steps AGL with Mark

decisions.text: Q3: VAT submission from neno for 6 customers; opening balance from the Q1/Q2 Exact close; backfilling deferred unless it risks the VAT outcome.
decisions.source: Granola: Next Steps AGL with Mark

open_questions.text: What must change in the current system to use double-entry bookkeeping for the Q3 VAT submission?
How do adjustments/corrections work for VAT when a period is closed?
How, when, and what will humans and agents be allowed to edit?
Multi-currency: how to handle FX gains/losses and cross-journal reporting?
Gapless-ledger requirement in Belgium — likely closed-period only; needs regulatory confirmation.
What reporting do we eventually want to run on the double-entry GL?

next_steps.text: DP session on GL design & open questions.
Review spike code for atomicity, security and correctness.
Reproduce the balance check in production with periods.
Confirm the gapless-ledger requirement for Belgium.
Map the VAT export to Nextens for submission.

meetings.title: Next Steps AGL with Mark
meetings.summary: Walked the double-entry GL design toward productionising for Ocean Ionics and the Q3 VAT submission.
decisions: Q1/Q2 Exact close as Q3 opening balance
open_questions: Edit permissions for humans vs agents
next_steps: Reproduce balance check in production by 25 Jun

fef38f90-b82c-4c47-b377-6dcb9b1a3020.sources_note: Granola folder 'Nenos Double-Entry GL' + #tech-team ledger threads.

ce07f00e-b392-40bd-85fb-2a4a831c9c80.title: Make neno the source of truth for all bookkeeping
ce07f00e-b392-40bd-85fb-2a4a831c9c80.exec_summary: Still a placeholder: a prioritised feature plan (AR reconciliation, credit notes, related-parties register, payroll, third-party wallet import, depreciation/accruals, native team features) with no projects or issues filed yet. End-to-end AR reconciliation is the first item queued (Planned, David). Much of the underlying architecture is being decided inside the double-entry GL initiative.
whats_changed: No project or issue activity in the last 14 days — the initiative remains in planning.

risks.text: Scope is broad and unsequenced; nothing is staffed yet beyond AR reconciliation being earmarked for David.

open_questions.text: Feature sequencing and ownership for the post-GL bookkeeping scope is not yet decided.

next_steps.text: Define and file the first projects, starting with end-to-end AR reconciliation.

ce07f00e-b392-40bd-85fb-2a4a831c9c80.sources_note: Keyword-derived only. Create a Granola folder and file the first Linear projects to enrich this page.
